sourceMovie.title: Child's Play 3
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Child's Play 3 (1991) as a horror theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: MaXXXine
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Child's Play 3 clicked for you, MaXXXine (2024) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Child's Play 3?
faq.answer: Try MaXXXine, Five Nights at Freddy's 2, Severance—each shares DNA with Child's Play 3 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Child's Play 3?
faq.answer: Child's Play 3 (1991) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Child's Play 3 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Child's Play Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
